sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) a girl, Jud. 19:4 , seqq.; Est 2:9, 13 also used of one νεόγαμος, Rth 2:6 (compare בְּתוּלָה).

(2) handmaid, a servant, Pro 9:3 31:15 Rth 2:8, 22 3:2 .

(3) [Naarah, Naarath], pr.n.-(a) of a town on the confines of the tribe of Ephraim ( Jos 16:7), called, 1Ch 7:28, נַעֲרָן.-(b) f. 1Ch 4:5.
